system.description:
It is not at all unusual for children of mixed parentage of humans and elves to be born into the world—the half-elves. A half-elf's life is typically hardened by the intolerance of others.

Secret Door Detection: When searching for secret doors, half-elves have a 2-in-6 chance of success

Animal Bond: A half-elf can befriend one pet when he reaches 5th level. Must spend one week with the animal, after which the pet will follow the half-elf everywhere and obey simple orders

Psionic Powers: Half-elves know a number of psionic powers depending on their level

Power Activation: Psionic Powers take effect at the end of the character's round

Mental Power Resistance: Can maintain multiple powers at the same time, except for those powers where concentration is required

Stronghold Leadership: A half-elf may strive to become a leader among humans and elves, constructing a stronghold either in the name of a human liege or founding a tribe with other elves
